title: National Symbol of Canada Act
description: National Symbol of Canada Act (National Symbol of Canada Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Symbol of Canada Act .

provisions.title: Beaver as a symbol of Canadian sovereignty
provisions.content: 2 It is hereby recognized and declared that the Beaver ( Castor canadensis ) is a symbol of the sovereignty of Canada and it is proclaimed that any representation of the Beaver ( Castor canadensis ) when used by Her Majesty in right of Canada shall be so used and so regarded.
